title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by company size
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Company-size medians are 1-10 employees n=13 at S$44,900; 11-50 n=37 at S$54,000; 51-200 n=40 at S$80,200; 201-1,000 n=38 at S$100,700; 1,001-10,000 n=44 at S$100,550; and 10,001 or more n=51 at S$112,500. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Values are self-reported total compensation medians. All published company-size cohorts meet the minimum n=10 threshold, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
